first_run.rationale: The score is identical in both evaluations, and the reasoning provided in the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same. The minor variations in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise and do not reflect any change in the core assessment of the candidate's skills. The evaluation remains focused on the technical stack mismatch, and the change of location from Berlin to Lagos had no discernible impact on the outcome.
